text:
User: make a wireframe runnable prototype use the multiple skills I added for you: ios-hig-design, mobile-ios-design, liquid-glass-design

run it on my computere asap

use sonnet agents to do the coding
 [...] I also saved a few notes for future sessions: the no-cards/full-bleed rule, this project's build/run commands, and that coding goes to Sonnet agents using the skills in `.agents/skills`.
